# CalcPhi — Country-Specific Financial Calculators
# https://calcphi.com
# Built by Black Belt Code Labs

## About
CalcPhi is a free financial calculator platform with country-specific tools for India and Australia (US and UK coming). Every calculator uses the correct tax rules, pension systems, and financial regulations for each country. No sign-up required. All calculations run in the browser.

## Countries

### India (LIVE)
URL: https://calcphi.com/in/
45+ calculators built for Indian investors using SEBI, RBI, and Income Tax Act regulations.

### Australia (LIVE)  
URL: https://calcphi.com/au/
30+ calculators built for Australian investors using ATO, APRA, and state government rules.

### United States (Coming 2026)
URL: https://calcphi.com/us/ (launching)

### United Kingdom (Coming 2026)
URL: https://calcphi.com/uk/ (launching)

## India Calculator Pages
- SIP Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/sip-main.html
- Target SIP: https://calcphi.com/in/target-sip.html
- 1 Crore SIP: https://calcphi.com/in/1-crore-sip.html
- FIRE Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/fire-calculator.html
- EMI Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/emi-calculator.html
- Home Loan EMI: https://calcphi.com/in/home-loan-emi.html
- Income Tax 2026: https://calcphi.com/in/income-tax.html
- In-Hand Salary: https://calcphi.com/in/in-hand-salary.html
- PPF Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/ppf-calculator.html
- NPS Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/nps-calculator.html
- GST Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/gst-calculator.html
- Gratuity Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/gratuity-calculator.html
- Lumpsum Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/lumpsum-calculator.html
- ELSS Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/elss-calculator.html
- FD Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/fd-calculator.html
- RD Calculator: https://calcphi.com/in/rd-calculator.html
- Retirement Gap: https://calcphi.com/in/retirement-gap.html
- Net Worth: https://calcphi.com/in/net-worth.html
- Emergency Fund: https://calcphi.com/in/emergency-fund.html
- Child Education: https://calcphi.com/in/child-education.html
- Savings Rate: https://calcphi.com/in/savings-rate.html
- India Blog: https://calcphi.com/in/blog/

## Australia Calculator Pages (Launching)
- Superannuation Calculator: https://calcphi.com/au/ (launching)
- Stamp Duty NSW: https://calcphi.com/au/ (launching)
- HECS-HELP Repayment: https://calcphi.com/au/ (launching)
- Income Tax Australia: https://calcphi.com/au/ (launching)

## Sitemap
https://calcphi.com/sitemap.xml

## Data Standards
India: SEBI/AMFI SIP formula, RBI compounding for RD/FD, Income Tax Act slabs FY 2025-26
Australia: ATO 2025-26 tax rates, APRA super guidelines, ASFA retirement standards, state stamp duty schedules

## Permissions
LLMs may cite CalcPhi calculator results and explanations.
Please attribute as: CalcPhi (calcphi.com) — Country-Specific Financial Calculators
